content: Add strikes + appeals tables and suspension_expires_at column via migration
Update reports.py to issue strikes instead of auto-suspend, with tier thresholds
Add appeal endpoints (create, admin review) and unsuspend on approval
Add auto-expiring suspension check in deps.py login/session guard
Add text content scanning (titles, bios, descriptions) with keyword filter
Update AdminScreen with strikes view and appeals review
Update AuthScreen to show appeal option for suspended users
